evidence_summary: Weight normalization can help stabilize the norm of gradients, making optimization of neural networks more robust to the value of the learning rate.
Batch normalization can reduce internal covariate shift and improve the conditioning of the optimization problem, leading to faster convergence and better generalization.
Batch normalization can be applied to the input of each nonlinearity in a convolutional way, and can be used in conjunction with increased learning rates and reduced L2 weight regularization.
